{{Item
| name = 
| image = Training treat.png
| id = training_treat
| type = Treats
| stackable = 64
}}<blockquote>'''Training Treat''' is the first treat you'll need to make.
* Each treat raises your dog's level by 1 and also raises your spendable points by 1
* This treat is no longer usable once your dog is level 20. <ref>https://doggytalents.fandom.com/wiki/List_of_treats</ref>
</blockquote>

== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! (Shapeless) Recipe
|-
| Gunpowder <br>+ Bone<br>+ String<br>+ Sugar<br>+ [[Rice Bowl]]
| [[File:Training treat crafting.png|484x484px]]
|}

== Usage ==
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' on your dog to use the item.<blockquote>''(DTN 1.18.0+)''   A Training Treat can directly convert an untamed wolf (even angry ones) into DTN Dogs.</blockquote>
== Used In ==
* [[Super Treat]]
* [[Hot Dog]]
* [[Golden A5 Wagyu]]
* [[Birthday Hat]]
== Trivia ==
* It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
* It is deemed the '''''key''''' to all of DTN's content.
* Its recipe changed in 1.18.0.
** Legacy recipe: 
[[File:Training treat crafting legacy.gif|210x210px]]
* In the future, there might be a massive overhaul of the treat mechanism.
